channel.title: New Mexico on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in New Mexico on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Norio Fernando Hayakawa
item.description:
Norio Hayakawa is an American activist born in Yokohama, Japan, in 1944. He is known for his UFOlogy investigations in New Mexico and the American Southwest. Hayakawa has appeared on Coast to Coast AM and was involved in organizing the Area 51 People’s Rally. He also led a Nippon TV crew in 1990 to investigate paranormal activity in Dulce, New Mexico.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norio_Hayakawa
